name: The Macerich Company
description: The Macerich Company is a leading real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on the acquisition, ownership, development, and management of high-quality retail properties in major U.S. markets. Headquartered in the United States, the company specializes in dominant, well-positioned shopping centers and mixed-use destinations in affluent, densely populated areas. By integrating retail with experiential elements, dining, and other uses, Macerich aims to create long-term value for shareholders and partners while maintaining a strong commitment to sustainability and corporate responsibility across its diverse national portfolio of iconic retail assets.
